=== RUN   TestGenerateGoCode_Company

--- GENERATED CODE (Company) ---
// Code generated by jsonschematogo. DO NOT EDIT.

package gen

type Company struct {
	Ceo       Person   `json:"ceo"`
	Employees []Person `json:"employees"`
	Founded   int      `json:"founded"`
	Name      string   `json:"name"`
}

type Person struct {
	Age   *int    `json:"age"`
	Email *string `json:"email"`
	Name  *string `json:"name"`
}

--- END GENERATED CODE ---

    generator_test.go:66: Generated code should contain field: Ceo Person
    generator_test.go:66: Generated code should contain field: Founded int
    generator_test.go:66: Generated code should contain field: Name string
    generator_test.go:78: Generated code should contain Person field: Name *string
    generator_test.go:78: Generated code should contain Person field: Age *int
    generator_test.go:82: Generated code:
        // Code generated by jsonschematogo. DO NOT EDIT.
        
        package gen
        
        type Company struct {
        	Ceo       Person   `json:"ceo"`
        	Employees []Person `json:"employees"`
        	Founded   int      `json:"founded"`
        	Name      string   `json:"name"`
        }
        
        type Person struct {
        	Age   *int    `json:"age"`
        	Email *string `json:"email"`
        	Name  *string `json:"name"`
        }
--- FAIL: TestGenerateGoCode_Company (0.00s)
=== RUN   TestGenerateGoCode_Primitives

--- GENERATED CODE (Primitives) ---
// Code generated by jsonschematogo. DO NOT EDIT.

package gen

type Primitives struct {
	ABool   *bool    `json:"a_bool"`
	AFloat  *float64 `json:"a_float"`
	ANull   *any     `json:"a_null"`
	AString *string  `json:"a_string"`
	AnInt   *int     `json:"an_int"`
}

--- END GENERATED CODE ---


--- GENERATED CODE ---
// Code generated by jsonschematogo. DO NOT EDIT.

package gen

type Primitives struct {
	ABool   *bool    `json:"a_bool"`
	AFloat  *float64 `json:"a_float"`
	ANull   *any     `json:"a_null"`
	AString *string  `json:"a_string"`
	AnInt   *int     `json:"an_int"`
}

--- END GENERATED CODE ---

    generator_test.go:120: Generated code should contain field: AnInt *int
    generator_test.go:120: Generated code should contain field: AFloat *float64
    generator_test.go:120: Generated code should contain field: ABool *bool
    generator_test.go:120: Generated code should contain field: ANull *any
    generator_test.go:124: Generated code:
        // Code generated by jsonschematogo. DO NOT EDIT.
        
        package gen
        
        type Primitives struct {
        	ABool   *bool    `json:"a_bool"`
        	AFloat  *float64 `json:"a_float"`
        	ANull   *any     `json:"a_null"`
        	AString *string  `json:"a_string"`
        	AnInt   *int     `json:"an_int"`
        }
--- FAIL: TestGenerateGoCode_Primitives (0.00s)

          	"",
